install_patterns: remote script tag (CDN) loaded at runtime from cdn.tailwindcss.com
risk_notes: All npm dependencies use caret (^) ranges, so non-exact versions will float on install; no lockfile shown.
Tailwind CSS is loaded via a remote CDN script tag with no integrity (SRI) hash or version pin — supply-chain risk if the CDN is compromised or content changes.
Secrets are committed in a tracked .env file (BROKERAGE_API_KEY, BROKERAGE_API_SECRET). Even labeled as 'paper', credentials in repo files are a leak risk and may be mistaken for real keys.
PAPER_API_URL points to a placeholder domain (paper-api.brokerage.com) that may not be controlled by the intended brokerage — risk of misdirection if the domain is registered by a third party.
No package-lock.json or npm-shrinkwrap.json referenced, so transitive dependency versions are unpinned and non-reproducible.

findings.evidence: No package-lock.json or npm-shrinkwrap.json referenced, so transitive dependency versions are unpinned and non-reproducible.
findings.message: LLM supply-chain extraction flagged a risk note.
